title: Seagrass Meadows
script_summary: Explore the vital role of seagrass meadows in our ecosystem and the uncertainties that surround them.

segments.voiceover: What if I told you seagrass meadows are vital yet often overlooked?
These underwater gardens cover vast areas, providing homes for countless marine species.
But they do more than house fish. They capture carbon—helping fight climate change.
Studies show they can store up to 83 million tons of carbon yearly, but...
They’re declining rapidly due to pollution and coastal development. What can we do?
Join the fight! Support seagrass conservation. Your actions matter.
